case_id: GAEC JOULIN farm in Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France

pi_items.source: Task specification requires journal entry dated 2017-06-15; date is reasonable within Ekylibre demo period
Task specification states €1,250.00 for hydraulic pump replacement; amount is realistic for this type of repair

French Plan Comptable Général (PCG): Account 6155 = 'Entretien et réparations sur biens mobiliers' (Maintenance and repairs on movable assets). Verified via: https://www.comptabilisation.fr/compte.php?compta_n=6155 and https://www.pennylane.com/fr/fiches-pratiques/plan-comptable/compte-6155-sur-biens-mobiliers

French Plan Comptable Général (PCG): Account 512 = 'Banque' (Bank account). Verified via official PCG documentation and https://www.plancomptable.com/accounts/51-banks-financial-and-similar-institutions.htm. Account 512 is the standard French bank account in Class 5 (Financial accounts).

Keywords are in French and match the task description: 'Réparation pompe hydraulique tracteur - Dupont Mécanique'. All keywords are appropriate French terms for the task context (hydraulic pump repair by mechanic Dupont).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, verifiable French accounting codes (6155 for equipment maintenance, 512 for bank accounts) from the official Plan Comptable Général. GAEC JOULIN is a real farm in Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France, and is the basis for Ekylibre's official first_run-demo dataset (released CC BY-SA 4.0 by the Ekylibre project on GitHub). The task amount of €1,250 is realistic for hydraulic pump replacement, and the date 2017-06-15 is within reasonable bounds for farm equipment maintenance records. The French keywords appropriately describe the transaction.
